mapper.select: SELECT SM.APNAMEN FROM ${commonSchema}.SUSRMA SU INNER JOIN ${commonSchema}.SUSRAP SA ON SU.USERKEY = SA.USERKEY AND SU.USERACT = SA.USERACT INNER JOIN ${commonSchema}.SAPPMA SM ON SA.APPLKEY = SM.APPLKEY WHERE SU.USERACT= #{useract}
SELECT SCHEMA_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.SCHEMATA WHERE SCHEMA_NAME LIKE CONCAT ('%', #{apnamen}, '%')

SELECT SU.USERKEY, SU.USERACT, SU.PASSWRD, SU.USERNAM , SU.ADDRESS, SU.CITYCOD, SU.RSONKEY, SU.POSTCOD, SU.NATN2KY , SU.TELPHNM, SU.EMAILAD, SU.DEPARTM, SU.EMPLOID , SU.ACAPDOC , SU.USERGR1, SU.USERGR2, SU.USERGR3, SU.LANGKEY , SU.DATEFMT, SU.TIMEFMT, SU.DECIFMT, SU.UTIMZON , SU.IDEXPDT, SU.PWEXPDT, SU.PWERCNT, SU.ALOCKED , SU.ALOCKMO, SU.POLPRYN, SU.POLSVYN , SU.POLSMYN, SU.POLEMYN, SU.POLDATE, SU.POLTIME , SU.APPROYN, SU.SIGUPYN, SU.APUSEYN, SU.ACTIVYN , SU.USRMEMO, SU.SOTAPYN, SU.SOTDATE , SU.SOTTIME, SU.CREDATE, SU.CRETIME, SU.CREUSER , SU.LMODATE, SU.LMOTIME, SU.LMOUSER, SU.UPDTCHK , SU.FCMTOKN
, SS.USERTYP, SS.ROLGKEY
FROM ${commonSchema}.SUSRMA SU
INNER JOIN ${schema}.SUSRSH SS ON SU.USERKEY = SS.USERKEY AND SU.USERACT = SS.USERACT
WHERE SU.USERACT = #{useract} AND SU.ACTIVYN = 'Y'
AND SU.APUSEYN = 'Y'

/* selectMainHeaderList */ SELECT SH.MNHDKEY, SH.MNHDNAM, SH.MNHDLKY FROM ${commonSchema}.SUSRMA SU INNER JOIN ${schema}.SUSRSH SS ON SS.USERKEY = SU.USERKEY INNER JOIN ${schema}.SROLGR SR ON SR.ROLGKEY = SS.ROLGKEY AND SR.RLUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${schema}.SMNGHD SH ON SH.HDUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${schema}.SMNUMA SA ON SA.MNHDKEY = SH.MNHDKEY AND SA.MNUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${schema}.SROLMN SL ON SL.MENUKEY = SA.MENUKEY AND SL.ROLGKEY = SR.ROLGKEY AND SS.ROLGKEY = SR.ROLGKEY AND SL.RMUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE SU.USERKEY = #{userkey} AND SU.USERACT = #{useract} GROUP BY SH.MNHDKEY, SH.MNHDNAM, SH.MNHDLKY

/* selectUserMenuList */ SELECT SM.MNHDKEY, SM.MENUKEY, SM.MENUFID, 'BOOKMARK' AS MENUGBN, SM.MENUNAM, SM.MENUSEQ, SM.MENULKY, SM.PROGRID, SM.PRGMURL, CONCAT('1-', SM.MNHDKEY, '-', LPAD(SM.MENUSEQ, 5, '0')) AS ORDRSEQ FROM ${commonSchema}.SUSRMA SU INNER JOIN ${schema}.SMNUBM SA ON SU.USERKEY = SA.USERKEY AND SA.USERACT = SU.USERACT INNER JOIN ${schema}.SMNUMA SM ON SM.PROGRID = SA.PROGRID AND SM.MNUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE SU.USERKEY = #{userkey} AND SU.USERACT = #{useract} AND SM.MENUKEY IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT DISTINCT SM.MNHDKEY, SM.MENUKEY, SM.MENUFID, SM.MENUGBN, SM.MENUNAM, SM.MENUSEQ, SM.MENULKY, SM.PROGRID, SM.PRGMURL, CONCAT('2-', SM.MNHDKEY, LPAD(SM.MENUSEQ, 5, '0')) AS ORDRSEQ FROM ${schema}.SMNUMA SM INNER JOIN ( SELECT SA.MENUFID, SA.MENUKEY FROM ${commonSchema}.SUSRMA SU INNER JOIN ${schema}.SUSRSH SS ON SS.USERKEY = SU.USERKEY AND SS.USERACT = SU.USERACT INNER JOIN ${schema}.SROLGR SR ON SR.ROLGKEY = SS.ROLGKEY AND SR.RLUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${schema}.SMNGHD SH ON SH.HDUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${schema}.SMNUMA SA ON SA.MNHDKEY = SH.MNHDKEY AND SA.MNUSEYN = 'Y' INNER JOIN ${schema}.SROLMN SL ON SL.MENUKEY = SA.MENUKEY AND SL.ROLGKEY = SR.ROLGKEY AND SS.ROLGKEY = SR.ROLGKEY AND SL.RMUSEYN = 'Y' WHERE SU.USERKEY = #{userkey} AND SU.USERACT = #{useract} ) SY ON (SM.MENUKEY = SY.MENUKEY OR SM.MENUKEY = SY.MENUFID) AND SY.MENUKEY IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ORDRSEQ
mapper.insert: insert into SUPAHI (USRPGSQ, USERACT, PROGRID, MENUNAM, THEMETY, CREUSER) values (fn_sy_usrpgsq(), #{useract}, #{progrid}, #{menunam}, #{themety}, #{useract} )

insert into ${userData.schema}.SGRIDH ( USERKEY, USERACT, PROGRID, PGRIDID, NUBRCEL, HOVERMD , FREZCOL, FREZROW, COLBODR, ROWBODR, STRPROW, GHEIGHT , CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER) values ( #{userData.userkey}, #{userData.useract}, #{param.progrid}, #{param.pgridid}, #{param.nubrcel}, #{param.hovermd} , #{param.frezcol}, #{param.frezrow}, #{param.colbodr}, #{param.rowbodr}, #{param.strprow}, #{param.gheight} , to_char(NOW() ,'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW() ,'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract} , to_char(NOW() ,'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW() ,'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE NUBRCEL = values(NUBRCEL), HOVERMD = values(HOVERMD), FREZCOL = values(FREZCOL) , FREZROW = values(FREZROW), COLBODR = values(COLBODR), ROWBODR = values(ROWBODR) , STRPROW = values(STRPROW), GHEIGHT = values(GHEIGHT) , LMODATE = values(LMODATE), LMOTIME = values(LMOTIME), LMOUSER = values(LMOUSER)

insert into ${userData.schema}.SGRIDL ( USERKEY, USERACT, PROGRID, PGRIDID, DATAIDX , SORTNUM, PHIDDEN, PQALIGN, DATATYP, PQWIDTH , CREDATE, CRETIME, CREUSER, LMODATE, LMOTIME, LMOUSER) values
( #{userData.userkey}, #{userData.useract}, #{progrid}, #{pgridid}, #{item.dataidx} , #{item.sortnum}, #{item.phidden}, #{item.pqalign}, #{item.datatyp}, #{item.pqwidth} , to_char(NOW() ,'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW() ,'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract} , to_char(NOW() ,'YYYYMMDD'), to_char(NOW() ,'hh24miss'), #{userData.useract} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE SORTNUM = values(SORTNUM), PHIDDEN = values(PHIDDEN), PQALIGN = values(PQALIGN) , DATATYP = values(DATATYP), PQWIDTH = values(PQWIDTH) , LMODATE = values(LMODATE), LMOTIME = values(LMOTIME), LMOUSER = values(LMOUSER)
mapper.select: /* selectUserApproveList */ SELECT CONCAT(USERKEY, USERACT) AS rowkey , USERKEY, USERACT, PASSWRD, USERNAM, ADDRESS , CITYCOD, RSONKEY, POSTCOD, NATN2KY, TELPHNM , EMAILAD, DEPARTM, EMPLOID, ACAPDOC, USERGR1 , USERGR2, USERGR3, LANGKEY, DATEFMT, TIMEFMT , DECIFMT, UTIMZON, IDEXPDT, PWEXPDT, PWERCNT , ALOCKED, ALOCKMO, POLPRYN, POLSVYN, POLSMYN , POLEMYN, POLDATE, POLTIME, APPROYN, SIGUPYN , APUSEYN, ACTIVYN, USRMEMO, SOTAPYN, SOTDATE , SOTTIME , DATE_FORMAT(CREDATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS CREDATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(CRETIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS CRETIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(CREUSER) AS CREUSER , DATE_FORMAT(LMODATE,'%Y-%m-%d') AS LMODATE , DATE_FORMAT(STR_TO_DATE(LMOTIME,'%H%i%s'),'%H:%i:%s') AS LMOTIME , ${userData.schema}.FN_SY_USERNAM(LMOUSER) AS LMOUSER , UPDTCHK FROM ${userData.commonSchema}.SUSRMA WHERE APPROYN = 'N' AND SIGUPYN = 'Y' AND APUSEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY CREDATE, CRETIME
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PH_COMMON.SUSRMA WHERE USERACT = #{useract};
SELECT PH_COMMON.FN_SY_USERKEY() AS USERKEY FROM DUAL
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.SGRIDH ( USERKEY, USERACT, PROGRID, PGRIDID , NUBRCEL, HOVERMD, FREZCOL, FREZROW , COLBODR, ROWBODR, STRPROW, GHEIGHT ) SELECT #{saveData.userkey}, #{saveData.useract}, PROGRID, PGRIDID , NUBRCEL, HOVERMD, FREZCOL, FREZROW , COLBODR, ROWBODR, STRPROW, GHEIGHT FROM ${userData.schema}.SGRIDH
AND USERACT = #{saveData.standardUseract}

INSERT INTO ${userData.schema}.SGRIDL ( USERKEY, USERACT, PROGRID, PGRIDID , DATAIDX, SORTNUM, PHIDDEN, PQALIGN , DATATYP, PQWIDTH ) SELECT #{saveData.userkey}, #{saveData.useract}, PROGRID, PGRIDID , DATAIDX, SORTNUM, PHIDDEN, PQALIGN , DATATYP, PQWIDTH FROM ${userData.schema}.SGRIDL
AND USERACT = #{saveData.standardUseract}
